notes: All 9 responses correctly capture the three-column layout and most of the settings category list. Recurrent weaknesses: (1) none mention the keyboard shortcuts (⌘N/⌘P/⌘K) or the extra top-right icons; (2) the Jan CLI path is frequently misread as '/Users/frederic/local/bin/jan' (missing the dot before 'local'); (3) 'Groq' is often misspelled 'Grok'; (4) the Automatic Update Check toggle state is frequently wrong (stated Off when it is ON). The most serious errors are provider-list fabrications at higher temperatures: t0.1|rep2 and t0.7|rep0 invent 'vLLM', and t0.7|rep1 invents 'XL' as the last REMOTE entry (the actual truncated entry is x.AI). No response was empty, truncated, or in a repetition loop.
